backup.full_text:
Whenever I investigate a bug, I let codex recreate the exact state in an emphemeral crabbox, verify the bug, fix it, verify the fix.

No messy state because local system might be polluted, and no slowdown because I run 10 sessions in parallel. https://t.co/SEj2XRpaD1 https://t.co/PiBG8YBdRM
